title: cakile edentula subsp. harperi
intro: Cakile edentula subsp. harperi, also known as Harper's sea rocket, is a subspecies of the Cakile edentula plant, a coastal annual plant native to North America. It has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which have been attributed to its high content of flavonoids and other bioactive compounds. The health benefits of Cakile edentula subsp. harperi include its potential to reduce inflammation and oxidative stress, as well as its possible role in protecting against certain diseases and conditions. The plant can be used to make herbal preparations such as teas, tinctures, and infusions, although more research is needed to fully understand its effects and potential uses.
